rationale: Review 1 correctly identifies that IsUnipotent is vacuous when defined under [AffineAlgGroup k A] (which requires geometrically reduced, hence no nilpotents) — a real mathematical design flaw confirmed directly from the diff. Review 2's unique finding misreads the omit keyword, incorrectly claiming callers must supply unneeded instances when omit already removes them, so acting on it would worsen the PR.
